extra.reason: transfer + rename complete: mmichie/plx → shiprock/plx → shiprock/chevron. Local remote updated to git@github.com:shiprock/chevron.git, fetch verified, HEAD matches origin/master at ca88e129. GitHub serves 301 redirects from the old URL so any existing clones keep working.

Full rename to chevron: dropped plx alias entirely (no [[bin]] alias, no flake symlink, no PLX_* env vars). Bumped to 0.5.0. Migration: users must rerun 'chevron init <shell>'. plx-7rc.4 closed in same pass — plxd phase issues retitled to chevrond.

Full rename to chevron: dropped plx alias entirely (no [[bin]] alias, no flake symlink, no PLX_* env vars). Bumped to 0.5.0. Migration: users must rerun 'chevron init <shell>'. plx-7rc.4 closed in same pass — plxd phase issues retitled to chevrond.

Published chevron 0.5.0 to crates.io and tagged v0.5.0 (pushed). Nix flake confirmed working via 'nix run github:shiprock/chevron'. Co-owner add deferred: requires creating a 'shiprock/<team>' team on GitHub first.

Published chevron 0.5.0 to crates.io and tagged v0.5.0 (pushed). Nix flake confirmed working via 'nix run github:shiprock/chevron'. Co-owner add deferred: requires creating a 'shiprock/<team>' team on GitHub first.

phase 1 complete: protocol+state+paths foundations, listener+lifecycle, status_for_cwd integration across all 3 call sites, daemon serve/start/stop/status CLI, auto-spawn with setsid+flock dedup, invariant test (daemon == inline). 342 lib + 42 integration tests green; clippy clean both feature configs. Deviations: thread-per-conn instead of 4-thread pool (documented); no idle timeout, no signal handling, no file logging (small follow-ons).

phase 2 complete: notify-based FS watching on each cached repo's gitdir. TTL tightened to 100ms as working-tree fallback; explicit git ops (commit/stage/checkout/stash) reflect within ~one frame via FsEvent invalidation. LRU eviction at 64 watches keeps inotify cost bounded. Tests cover event-triggered invalidation, unrelated-path immunity, path-to-workdir ancestor resolution, and LRU semantics. Manually verified: git checkout -b, git add, git commit all visible in the very next prompt without stale data.

zsh transient prompt landed. accept-line ZLE widget swaps PROMPT to colour-coded chevron and reset-prompts before dispatching to the original (or any prior override). Verified in real zsh: widget registration, exit-status-driven colour switching, CHEVRON_TRANSIENT=0 opt-out. 350 lib + 42 integration tests green.

zsh post-exec duration tag landed. Dim duration line in precmd, threshold CHEVRON_TRANSIENT_DURATION_MS (default 2000ms), minute/decimal format pivot at 60s, opt-out via CHEVRON_TRANSIENT=0. Design pivot from issue spec (in-place cursor rewrite) to separate-line emission — same user value, robust across terminals. 353 lib + 42 integration tests green.

async stale-then-fresh prompt for zsh landed. CHEVRON_CACHE_FILE env var on chevron-side writes the rendered prompt atomically; shell-side _chevron_start_async uses process substitution + zle -F for the background pipe and zle reset-prompt for the redraw. Opt-in via CHEVRON_ASYNC=1 (off by default — most users won't notice the difference vs the existing ~10ms sync, but huge-repo users get a sub-ms perceived latency). 359 lib + 45 integration tests green. Unblocks bash and fish ports.

fish port landed. Transient prompt via Enter binding + flag + commandline -f repaint/execute (the fish-idiomatic pattern, same shape Starship uses). Post-exec duration tag via fish_postexec event + native $CMD_DURATION (no preexec timestamp tracking needed, unlike zsh). Opt-out via CHEVRON_TRANSIENT=0. Async stale-then-fresh deliberately excluded — fish needs a different pipe-watching approach and the issue scoped it out. 364 lib + 45 integration tests green.

bash port landed. Post-exec duration tag ported via PROMPT_COMMAND (same format and env-var contract as zsh/fish). Transient prompt deliberately omitted — bash's bind -x and DEBUG-trap workarounds both break on multi-line input, wrapped lines, and compound commands. Same reason powerlevel10k stays zsh-only and Starship doesn't ship a bash transient. A regression test locks in the omission decision. Verified in real bash: duration line appears for slow commands and CHEVRON_TRANSIENT=0 export disables it cleanly. 368 lib + 45 integration tests green. This closes the chevron-7fs epic.

epic complete. zsh: transient + post-exec + async stale-then-fresh. fish: transient + post-exec. bash: post-exec (transient omitted with rationale). All env-var-gated: CHEVRON_TRANSIENT, CHEVRON_TRANSIENT_DURATION_MS, CHEVRON_ASYNC. 5 child issues all closed.

OSC 133 markers (A/B/C/D) emitted in all three shell inits. zsh wraps OSC sequences in %{...%} brackets and bash in \[...\] for prompt-width tracking; fish needs no brackets. Helper _chevron_make_prompt with REPLY keeps the three zsh PROMPT-setting sites (sync, async, transient) consistent. Default ON, opt out via CHEVRON_OSC133=0. Verified PS1 byte content via hex dump in real bash. 375 lib + 45 integration tests green.

adaptive path rendering landed. Inside a git repo, the path collapses to repo-parent-relative form (chevron src segments instead of ~ src chevron src segments), saving 2 components universally. Other adaptive criteria from the issue were verified as already-met by existing segments (git/aws/nix_shell/venv/jobs/status/cmd_duration all hide when irrelevant). Plugin architecture for new 'situations' deferred as future work. Opt-out via CHEVRON_REPO_RELATIVE_PATH=0. PathSegment does its own Repository::discover (redundant with GitSegment) — noted as a follow-on optimization that would require carrying workdir through the daemon protocol. 385 lib + 45 integration tests green.

fixed via cursor-rewrite in precmd. accept-line draws a neutral chevron + saves cursor with DECSC; precmd does SCOSC + DECRC + erase + colored chevron + cmd + SCORC to rewrite the transient line in place with the now-known exit status. Same pattern in fish via fish_postexec. bash already skipped transient. Fragility documented in code: vim/less/etc. that manipulate DECSC clobber our save (rewrite falls through to neutral, not lying); commands whose output scrolled past the transient line glitch. Same edge case set powerlevel10k accepts. 388 lib + 45 integration tests green.
Shipped in feat(daemon): command lifecycle hooks (commit 4be81a7 on unstable)
Shipped in feat(history): query CLI (commit efae3bd on unstable); follow-ups filed as 2.1-2.6 children
Shipped in feat(daemon): live prompt subscriber + push-direction wire (commit aba79c5 on unstable); follow-ups filed as chevron-1yn.3.x children
Shipped in feat(capture): PTY-interposing output capture (commit 3bb5c85 on unstable); follow-ups filed as chevron-1yn.4.x children

All four phases shipped to unstable: 1yn.1 (lifecycle hooks), 1yn.2 (history CLI), 1yn.3 (live prompt subscriber), 1yn.4 (PTY-based output capture). Follow-up work tracked under chevron-1yn.X.x children for each phase.

v1 shipped: doctor subcommand with environment/chevron/shell-integration/self-test sections, --json/--no-color/--fast/--check/--help flags, exit 0/1/2 by max severity. Reuses health::Check+Severity (Info variant added). Heavier checks (perf bench, daemon round-trip, config dump, commands.db, outputs/, --no-secrets) tracked separately in chevron-j1y.

v1 shipped: chevron configure with 5 presets (lean/pure/rainbow/classic/minimal), live preview using user's real env, inquire-based TUI, --dry-run + --preset for non-interactive use. Pure-functional emit.rs (snapshot-tested) + safe writer with backup. Three v1 cuts (--install-shell, icon swapping, two-line preset) tracked in chevron-rfl.

Shipped: [shell] block in config.toml is now the source of truth for the six init toggles, with env-var override precedence (env > config > default) via the shell value idiom. CHEVRON_REPO_RELATIVE_PATH moved to [segment.path].repo_relative. Wizard snippet collapsed to single eval line. Doctor flags legacy env exports for migration. 685 tests pass.

v1 shipped: chevron init zsh --instant-prompt prints a paste-in top-of-rc snippet that paints the cached prompt before .zshrc finishes loading. Pure zsh ($(<file), no fork). Stdout/stderr captured to /tmp buffer during init, replayed in takeover block at top of _chevron_precmd. zshexit hook restores fds if .zshrc crashes. OSC 133 D emitted to close the spurious prompt region. Multi-shell guard (looks for %{ markers). Doctor adds presence check. 11 new tests. zsh -n parse-clean. No env var gate (presence = opt-in). v1 limitations documented: terminal wrap, interactive reads, % in paths. ~180 LoC. Configure-v2 (chevron-rfl) will add wizard integration.

Fixed: preamble now uses `export VAR="${VAR-default}"` direct assignment instead of `: "${VAR:=default}"`. The colon-builtin form was alias-expanded by zsh when users had `alias :='cd ..'` defined (common dotfile pattern), producing 6 `string not in pwd: ..` errors at every shell startup. Direct assignment bypasses the alias entirely. Added regression test that the preamble does not start any line with `: `. Body unchanged. 621 lib tests pass.
Fixed and pushed in d2d51fa on unstable; brace-group scoping at all five sites, PTY regression tests verified to bite pre-fix.

Fixed: raw mode now precedes the zselect probe (partial-line typeahead visible, query skipped); CSI-less read buffers are re-injected via print -z with the eaten R restored. PTY regression test paste_leftovers_during_interactive_read_stay_clean verified to fail pre-fix.

Fixed: _chevron_query_row takes a linger window; precmd's rewrite query passes 30 (300ms) so a timed-out response is drained inside the helper's raw window instead of kernel-echoing after echo restore. PTY regression test slow_precmd_dsr_response_never_leaks (new Dsr::AlternateDelayed + Render::SyncDelayed harness modes) verified to fail pre-fix 3x.

Fixed: both tty dances (query helper, precmd sweep) wrapped in { try } always { restore } blocks; always-list runs on interrupt and on early return. Regression test ctrl_c_during_dsr_sweep_leaves_tty_sane (Silent DSR, ^C landed 100ms into the sweep drain, stty -g state compared before/after) verified to fail 3x pre-fix. Known cosmetic residue: an interrupted precmd serves the collapsed stub as the next prompt for one cycle.

instant_prompt_paints_takes_over_and_restores_fds: seeds the cache, installs the snippet at the top of the hermetic .zshrc, asserts cached paint (raw stream), .zshrc output replay at takeover, and functional stderr afterwards. Built on a new spawn_customized fixture hook.
transient_disabled_sends_no_dsr_queries (zero ESC[6n bytes, zero chevron glyphs) and osc133_disabled_emits_no_markers (zero ESC]133 bytes) pin both escape hatches at the raw-stream level.

Implemented the four applicable gaps: collapse-flag gating (alternate accept widgets), exact-margin xenl skip, PS2 reset-prompt guard, fish validity/pager gating + cancel/postexec flag clear + vi-mode bindings. PTY regression tests alternate_accept_widget_skips_rewrite and exact_width_input_skips_rewrite_cleanly verified to fail pre-fix; unit assertions for the PS2 guard and fish gating. Deferred follow-ups filed separately (transient-on-interrupt polish, VTE geometry race). Clones remain in /tmp/prompt-research.
